subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1913-04-28
subcodes.first_line: Your meeting yesterday afternoon was very good. I did not feel well but for your sake I came. The gathering of the believers is the assembly of the spiritual ones.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیروز با آنکه هیچ حالت نداشتم محض خاطر شما بمجلس آمدم زیرا که مجمع احباء محفل روحانیان است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transcending the material condition, @Christ; Christianity, @race unity; racial issues
